fields.name: docket_number
fields.label: Docket Number
fields.instructions: Enter the docket number assigned to your case by the court. This is found on any court documents you have received.

fields.name: case_name
fields.label: Case Name
fields.instructions: Enter the full case name, typically in the format Plaintiff v. Defendant, exactly as it appears on your court documents.

fields.name: court_department
fields.label: Court Department
fields.instructions: Select the court department where your case is filed. Choose only one: Boston Municipal Court, District Court, Housing Court, Juvenile Court, Land Court, Probate and Family Court, or Superior Court.

fields.name: court_division
fields.label: Court Division or County
fields.instructions: Enter the specific division or county of the court, for example: Eastern Division, Suffolk County.

fields.name: appearance_type
fields.label: Appearance Type
fields.instructions: State whether you are appearing for yourself or as an attorney. If appearing as an attorney, provide the name of the person you represent.

fields.name: attorney_for
fields.label: Attorney For (if applicable)
fields.instructions: If you are an attorney, enter the full name of the client you represent.

fields.name: full_name
fields.label: Full Name (First, Middle, Last)
fields.instructions: Enter your full legal name in the order: first name, middle name or initial, last name.

fields.name: bbo_number
fields.label: B.B.O. or State Bar Number
fields.instructions: If you are an attorney, enter your Board of Bar Overseers number. Leave blank if you are not an attorney.

fields.name: firm_name
fields.label: Firm or Agency Name
fields.instructions: If you are filing on behalf of a law firm or agency, enter the full name here. Leave blank if not applicable.

fields.name: phone_office
fields.label: Office or Home Phone Number
fields.instructions: Enter your office or home phone number including area code, for example: 617-555-0123.

fields.name: street_address
fields.label: Street Address
fields.instructions: Enter your full street address including street number and street name.

fields.name: apt_unit
fields.label: Apt / Unit Number
fields.instructions: Enter your apartment or unit number if applicable.

fields.name: phone_mobile
fields.label: Mobile Phone Number
fields.instructions: Enter your mobile phone number including area code.

fields.name: city_town
fields.label: City or Town
fields.instructions: Enter the city or town of your address.

fields.name: state
fields.label: State
fields.instructions: Enter the two-letter state abbreviation, for example: MA for Massachusetts.

fields.name: date
fields.label: Date
fields.instructions: Enter today's date in month/day/year format.
